name: Slack GIF Creator
description: Create animated GIFs programmatically and optimize them for Slack's file size constraints. Uses Python scripts with easing functions, frame composition, and GIF building to produce smooth, Slack-ready animations from code-driven specifications.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md, Python core library modules (easing.py, frame_composer.py, gif_builder.py, validators.py), requirements.txt, and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified at skills/slack-gif-creator/ in the repo tree.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
